title: Event Title 1
description: This is a placeholder description for Event 1. It demonstrates how the event card component will display summary text on the listing page. The content is intended to be replaced with actual event details—such as the purpose, activities, and outcomes—but this template provides a consistent structure for development and testing purposes. Keep it concise yet informative to give visitors a clear preview of what to expect when they click through to the full event page.
